# Data.Char

<!-- Generated by `prism docs` from `lib/std/Data/Char.pr`. Do not edit by hand. -->

ASCII character classification.

Operates on the byte/codepoint returned by `byte_at`/`char_at`. The prelude opens this module.

## Functions and Values

### `is_digit`

```prism,sig,h-4459a97047fb4a96ae1bbe5d12036e3fa586b3acbc3821644bd79c36b15904ea
is_digit : (Int) -> Bool
```

True for an ASCII decimal digit (`0`-`9`).

### `is_upper`

```prism,sig,h-15945dd9e707a7b46e4e333251d48da1ac1ec30564bc00f8989007ba75c9fbdd
is_upper : (Int) -> Bool
```

True for an ASCII upper-case letter (`A`-`Z`).

### `is_lower`

```prism,sig,h-02fb6afae2da45914455abe7cd0f0479fa4d136e5a4aa58977af0ac135841a9b
is_lower : (Int) -> Bool
```

True for an ASCII lower-case letter (`a`-`z`).

### `is_alpha`

```prism,sig,h-f2fc097a4a532245656dd46c06203498d2351f3196abfc859ad948b7ab126a80
is_alpha : (Int) -> Bool
```

True for an ASCII letter.

### `is_alnum`

```prism,sig,h-7f6772b4b549d2a70719151b588679eb48c22b8b36c6100e097767d8ca67e452
is_alnum : (Int) -> Bool
```

True for an ASCII letter or digit.

### `is_space`

```prism,sig,h-21ff46231fdda8120121d7930a2cb3eb50a0cf4fbe716e2d7354ec29c7504dba
is_space : (Int) -> Bool
```

True for ASCII whitespace (space, tab, newline, or carriage return).

### `to_lower_c`

```prism,sig,h-93025a873b1120ea038104af1361d5f7fb5ae79923682d8fbfee3cc7bfad8164
to_lower_c : (Int) -> Int
```

Lower-case an ASCII letter; any other codepoint is returned unchanged.

### `to_upper_c`

```prism,sig,h-0fbd99f16182bd7e0a7fe6a9ee30dd6969d2b94d25e22281a818d1794ad5fcb6
to_upper_c : (Int) -> Int
```

Upper-case an ASCII letter; any other codepoint is returned unchanged.
